name: ts-cli-report
description: Composable reporting primitives for modern TypeScript CLI tools.
author: Acyte Tech

scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => { fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true }); })"
scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/**/*.test.js
